text:
9 PRs merged this week. The showcase is getting wild—someone built an AI City Diorama generator, and another shipped LoreLoom, an interactive storybook. We also added PromptPilot to the MCP server because making agents talk to each other is just what we do now.

Under the hood: frontend speed runs (lazy-loading, SWR caching) so things snap into place faster, plus some necessary un-breaking of image editing URLs and billing logic.

Everything's open source. Come build something weird. 🌸

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #generativeai #mcp
